name: Gedatsu (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright) and the Artist Credit (Note: there is no pencil design on top of the artist name).
